name: Sui Beginner
description: Learn Sui fundamentals — object model, Move language, PTBs, zkLogin. Adaptive for EVM devs, Solana devs, or total beginners.

name: Learn
description: Review, search, and export project learnings across sessions.

name: Find Next Crypto Idea
description: Discover and evaluate crypto startup ideas on Sui. 500+ curated ideas from YC, Alliance, a16z, and Sui ecosystem.

name: Validate Idea
description: Stress-test your Sui project idea with on-chain demand signals and competitive analysis.

name: Competitive Landscape
description: Map competitors, substitutes, and moats in the Sui ecosystem.

name: DefiLlama Research
description: Real-time DeFi market research using DefiLlama data filtered for Sui.

name: Sui Overflow Copilot
description: Research Sui Overflow hackathon projects, run gap analysis, explore winning patterns.

name: Scaffold Project
description: Set up a complete Sui workspace from a validated idea. Stack decisions, starter repos, MCP/skill installation.

name: Build with Claude
description: Guided MVP implementation on Sui in 3-5 milestones, each 1-2 hours.

name: Build DeFi Protocol
description: Build DeFi on Sui — AMMs, lending, vaults using Move modules, shared objects, and PTBs.

name: Launch Token
description: Create and launch a Sui Coin using coin::create_currency, TreasuryCap, and CoinMetadata.

name: Build Data Pipeline
description: Build indexers, event subscriptions, and analytics pipelines on Sui.

name: Build Mobile
description: Build mobile Sui dApps with React Native and @mysten/dapp-kit.

name: Debug Move
description: Diagnose Move errors, object ownership issues, failed transactions, and gas estimation problems.

name: Review and Iterate
description: Code review for quality, Move security, and production readiness on Sui.

name: Virtual Sui Incubator
description: Deep technical bootcamp: Sui architecture, Mysticeti consensus, object model, PTBs, Move patterns.

name: Brand Design
description: Color palettes, typography, gradients, and shadcn integration for your Sui app.

name: Frontend Design Guidelines
description: Layout, animations, forms, and Sui-specific UI patterns with dApp Kit.

name: Number Formatting
description: Crypto-specific number formatting for SUI, MIST, large token amounts.

name: Page Load Animations
description: Motion design with spring presets for loading states and transitions.

name: Design Taste
description: Anti-AI-slop design judgment. Build apps that look crafted, not generated.

name: Navigate Skills
description: Browse all installed brokenigloo skills, repos, and MCPs.

name: Product Review
description: Balanced UX evaluation with improvement roadmap for your Sui app.

name: Roast My Product
description: Brutal, honest product critique. Find every flaw before your users do.

name: CSO — Security Audit
description: Infrastructure security audit: secrets, dependencies, CI/CD, OWASP checks.

name: Deploy to Mainnet
description: Pre-flight checklist, sui client publish, UpgradeCap management, production RPC setup.

name: Create Pitch Deck
description: 12-slide investor pitch deck framework for Sui projects.

name: Submit to Hackathon
description: Optimized Sui Overflow submission with demo script and judging criteria alignment.

name: Marketing Video
description: Code-driven video production via Remotion + AI generation.

name: Video Craft
description: Frame composition and visual polish for marketing videos.

name: Apply for Grant
description: Sui Foundation grant application guidance and templates.

name: Integrate Cetus
description: Deep integration guide for Cetus Protocol concentrated liquidity AMM. Pool creation, swaps, LP management, fee collection.

name: Integrate DeepBook
description: Deep integration guide for DeepBook V3 on-chain CLOB. Limit/market orders, flash loans, balance manager.

name: Integrate Suilend
description: Deep integration guide for Suilend lending protocol. Deposit, borrow, repay, withdraw, SpringSui LST.

name: Integrate Scallop
description: Deep integration guide for Scallop lending. Supply, borrow, obligation management, market queries.

name: Integrate 7K Aggregator
description: Deep integration guide for 7K meta-DEX aggregator. Best-rate swaps across all Sui DEXs.

name: Integrate NAVI
description: Deep integration guide for NAVI Protocol lending and aggregation. Supply, borrow, swap routing.

name: Integrate Walrus
description: Deep integration guide for Walrus decentralized storage. Store/read blobs, Walrus Sites, file management.

name: Integrate Enoki
description: Deep integration guide for Enoki zkLogin + sponsored transactions. Sign in with Google, gasless UX.

name: Integrate Shinami
description: Deep integration guide for Shinami RPC, Gas Station, and Invisible Wallets.

name: Integrate Seal
description: Deep integration guide for Seal decentralized secrets management. Encrypted storage, token-gated access.

name: Integrate SuiNS
description: Deep integration guide for SuiNS name service. Resolve names, register domains, display .sui names.

name: Integrate dApp Kit
description: Deep integration guide for @mysten/dapp-kit React wallet connection. All hooks, providers, and patterns.
